title: Google Calendar integration with different calendar options from same email
excerpt: We are looking for an integration with Google Calendar to help keep our teams organized and up to date. We would like to be able to have the option to create items in different calendars within a single email address. Th…

posts.author: milica8 (Milica Ivanovic)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are looking for an integration with Google Calendar to help keep our teams organized and up to date. We would like to be able to have the option to create items in different calendars within a single email address. This will enable our teams to easily keep track of their tasks and other activities, and we would not do the double job by making items in both monday and Google Calendar.

Another great option would be a timeline button for integration with Google Calendar. Takes less space on Monday, and it’s easier to manage rather than Start Date and End Date.

We really appreciate the work you do and we are sure that this integration will help increase productivity in our organization. We are looking forward to making it happen. Thank you!

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @milica8,

Thank you for your feature request - we certainly hear where you’re coming from here

We wanted to let you know that there is an existing feature request that addresses a similar need, if you wanted to up-vote it here: Google Calendar integration - choose destination calendar.

posts.author: andres-at-connex (Andrés at Connex)
posts.cookedHtml: @milica8 what you request may be deployed with Zapier. Let me know if you’d like to learn how

posts.author: milica8 (Milica Ivanovic)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes please, this would be so helpful!

posts.author: YashGarg (Yash Garg)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @milica8 ,

We recently launched the app Google Calendar Sync - monday.com App Marketplace, which allows you to choose any of your calendars instead of just being restricted to your primary calendar.

Furthermore it allows you to use timeline columns as well, instead of being restricted to using 2 separate start-end columns. It should fit your use case perfectly.

Other Features

  1. Ability to select any calendar instead of default one
  2. Ability to create event on status column change
  3. Ability to configure realtime 1-way sync and 2-way sync as per need
  4. Ability to send invites to team members and guests from monday itself
